ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the forum was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the forum was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the forum is public or private */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the forum is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum where the topic is posted */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the topic */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the topic was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the topic has received */,
  "answers" INTEGER /* Number of answers posted to the topic */,
  "last_message_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last message posted in the topic */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the topic is locked */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the topic is sticky */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_seen_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last seen online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic where the message is posted */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the message */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the message has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the topic */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the topic was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_views_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums_topics" (
  "forums_topics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forums_topics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_topics_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic being subscribed to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user subscribing to the topic */,
  "subscribed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user subscribed to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_subscriptions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_tags_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum associated with the permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "can_create_topic" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role can create topics */,
  "can_delete_message" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role can delete messages */,
  "can_lock_topic" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role can lock topics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_permissions_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
